description:
To Book a Free Call With Our Insurance Experts:

Health Insurance : https://px2.in/OC2bn4z 
Term Insurance : https://px2.in/rDHNZDf #icicilombard #icici 

ICICI Lombard Health Shield 360 is a comprehensive health insurance plan designed to provide extensive coverage against unexpected medical expenses. This plan offers a wide range of benefits, ensuring that you and your loved ones are well protected in case of hospitalization, medical emergencies, and unforeseen health issues. With features such as cashless hospitalization, pre and post-hospitalization expenses coverage, and a variety of add-ons, Health Shield 360 is tailored to meet the needs of individuals and families alike. The policy includes coverage for critical illnesses, day-care procedures, and even alternative treatments like Ayurveda and Homeopathy. Additionally, it offers a no-claim bonus, ensuring that if you don't make any claims in a policy year, your sum insured amount increases, providing added value over time. With ICICI Lombard's wide network of hospitals and easy claim processes, Health Shield 360 ensures peace of mind, allowing you to focus on your recovery without worrying about financial burdens. Whether you're looking for a plan that supports general health care needs or need more specialized coverage, ICICI Lombard Health Shield 360 aims to be the comprehensive solution to your health insurance needs.

comments.text: My son, Sourja, had 15L insured with them for cashless hospitalization. THEY DID NOT ACCEPT CASHLESS please when he had to get a stent installed after a heart attack. For last 3 months we are trying to get the hospital expenses reimbursed. We have contacted them over phone and in Kolkata Office many times. The polite Help Desk guy simply confirms that all papers are OK and we shall be paid, just we have to submit it on line. We have submitted all papers they asked for several times now. We are rewarded only by FURTHER QUERIES. For several months now we are running from pillar to post, but they simply don't pay

comments.text: icici Health policy... Maine bhi liya hai. Lekin iss company ka service bahut hi kharab hai. Maine HDFC ergo optima secure se Icici Lombard elevate plan main port Kia tha. Ye company mara port details  update nahi kia. Main abhi 3 rd year ka premium bhi de Chuka hu, matlab 3years chal Raha hai abhi. Recently mare wife ka ek operation huwa, apply karne ke bad bhi mujhe cashless nahi mila. Maine khud bill pay Kia hospital main. Reason pucha to bola Mera port detail update nahi kia tha icici Lombard ne. Main 1000 bar customer care pH. Kia kise ke pass koyi solution nahi. Details kyu update nahi kia bata nahi sakta woh log. Ye kiski galti hai. Aap loghi batao. Abhi mujhe bol rahe hai Reimbursement ke liye apply Karo. Maine Kia. Abhi Tak koyi solution nahi. Kal ek form diya couter offer ke liye... waha likha hai Mujhe Elevate plan se health sheild product main Jana hoga. Mujhe 4000/ ka discount milega Jo main esh saal ka premium diya ush main. but reimbursement  amount milega ya nahi woh nahi likha. Form main sigh karne ke liya kaha gaya. Agar main 10 days ke andar sign nahi karunga toh likha hai Mera pura ish saal premium wapah karega aur Jo main policy liya woh terminate ho jayega. Ye froud company hai... Inka customer care service worst se worst hai. Inka kisi bhi bat ka koyi bharosa nahi hai. Main aap logo ko suggest kar Raha hu ICICI health policy kabhi mat lena.
comments.author: @Pranjit1985

comments.text: My father 68 years and mother 64 years had ICICI complete health insurance. They increased premiums to 1,32,600 rupees per year for both them. They mentioned reason behind increase is age, inflation,covid etc. I have no claims in the past 4 years. I have insurance with them from the past 20 years. They won't give value to it. They clearly know once you become old you will struck with them no matter how much premium increase. I tried portability too no one takes them because of their age even they are healthier. So, think twice before you took insurance with them.
comments.author: @krprakash6
